title: stylidium schizanthum
intro: Stylidium schizanthum, also known as Trigger Plant, is a unique and intriguing species of flowering plant belonging to the family Stylidiaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its distinctive trigger-like mechanism that closes its leaves when touched. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Stylidium schizanthum include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, sore throats, and digestive problems, while also promoting overall well-being and immunity.
